notes: Returns the Log tab to the normal event-list view after saving a status or edit.
Prevents the selected-event graph-focus mode from hiding event rows after Save.
Removes the tall blank graph-only area by allowing the SVG graph to use its natural height.
Does not change driving events, duty times, miles, route/load data, DOT wallet, or backup/import data.
